case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS CITY & COUNTY OF S F S.F.WATER DEPARTMENT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S F S.F.WATER DEPARTMENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-06-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S F S.F.WATER DEPARTMENT
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-13-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 00 TRIAL OF OCT-06-1993 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-13-1993, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO OCT-28-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-28-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO DEC-01-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S F S.F.WATER DEPARTMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY HEARING SET FOR JAN-07-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-07-1994, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-01-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-18-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-18-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S F S.F.WATER DEPARTMENT $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,530.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF S F S.F.WATER DEPARTMENT
